log.text: Created comprehensive agent-to-agent communication protocol with message-passing system, capability registry, priority queues, context sharing, and task delegation. Files: agent_protocol.py (27KB), test_agent_protocol.py (11KB). 20/22 tests passing - core functionality verified.

Created comprehensive input validation layer with schema-based validation, type checking, sanitization, and predefined schemas for all database operations. Files: validation.py (27KB), validated_commands.py (14KB), test_validation.py (19KB).

Task 3 complete: Comprehensive input validation layer with schema-based validation, type checking, sanitization, and predefined schemas for all database operations. Files: validation.py (27KB), validated_commands.py (14KB), test_validation.py (19KB).

Created persistent session recovery system with state serialization to disk, integrity checking via SHA-256 checksums, automatic recovery on restart with backup fallback, and graceful degradation. Includes SessionState, SessionPersistence with atomic writes, SessionRecoveryManager with background cleanup, and PersistentAuthenticator for drop-in replacement. Files: session_recovery.py (31KB), test_session_recovery.py (15KB).

Created query optimizer with execution planning, cost estimation, plan caching, and index advisor. Includes SQL parser, cost model with statistics, and EXPLAIN-style output. Files: query_optimizer.py (30KB), test_query_optimizer.py (10KB). All 30 tests passing.

Created concurrent index operations system with online index building that doesn't block reads/writes. Features: background construction with progress tracking, hot-swapping from READY to ACTIVE state, pending write queues during build, validation sampling, unique constraint enforcement, range scans, and IndexManager for lifecycle management. Files: concurrent_index.py (20KB), test_concurrent_index.py (9KB). All 20 tests passing.

Task 6 complete: Concurrent index operations with online index building that doesn't block reads/writes. Background construction, hot-swapping, pending writes queue, validation sampling, unique constraints, range scans. Files: concurrent_index.py (20KB), test_concurrent_index.py (9KB). All 20 tests passing.

Created streaming results system for large datasets with progressive result streaming, cursor-based iteration, chunked fetching, backpressure handling, and JSON encoding. Features: ResultCursor with buffering, StreamingResultSet with producer-consumer pattern, StreamingQueryExecutor, JSONStreamEncoder for JSON Lines format, and StreamingResponse for HTTP streaming. Files: streaming_results.py (18KB), test_streaming_results.py (9KB). All 26 tests passing.

Created write-ahead logging (WAL) system for crash recovery with durable transaction logging. Features: LogRecord with checksums and binary serialization, WriteAheadLog with LSN tracking and log rotation, ARIES-style recovery with analysis/redo/undo phases, TransactionManager for WAL integration, and checkpoint support. Files: write_ahead_log.py (19KB), test_write_ahead_log.py (11KB). All 16 tests passing.

Created distributed transaction coordinator implementing two-phase commit (2PC) protocol for cross-shard transactions. Features: TransactionState and ParticipantState enums, Participant and DistributedTransaction dataclasses, TwoPhaseCommitCoordinator with begin/prepare/commit/abort phases, ShardParticipant for participant-side logic, DistributedTransactionManager for high-level coordination, and recovery support. Files: distributed_tx.py (10KB), test_distributed_tx.py (8KB). Tests verified - all passing.

Created schema migration system with versioned schema changes and rollback support. Features: MigrationStatus and MigrationType enums, MigrationStep with SHA-256 checksums, Migration dataclass with full metadata, SchemaVersion with semantic versioning, MigrationExecutor with topological sorting and transaction safety, MigrationHistory with JSON persistence, SchemaMigrator for high-level workflow management, migration templates for common operations, and helper functions for creating table/index migrations. Files: schema_migration.py (19KB), test_schema_migration.py (14KB). All 25 tests passing.

Created vector similarity search system for semantic queries. Features: DistanceMetric enum (COSINE, EUCLIDEAN, DOT_PRODUCT, MANHATTAN), VectorDocument with metadata and normalization, VectorIndex with brute-force and IVF (Inverted File Index) approximate search using k-means clustering, VectorSearchEngine for managing multiple indexes, hybrid search with keyword filtering, EmbeddingGenerator for text-to-vector encoding, SemanticSearcher high-level interface, utility functions for distance calculations. Files: vector_search.py (18KB), test_vector_search.py (12KB). All 33 tests passing.
